zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡，等待方向突破
zh.content:
SOL/USD现报84.39，24小时波动较窄，高低点仅在84.19至84.42之间，显示市场观望情绪明显。价格仍处于20日均线85.244下方，短线结构偏弱，整体走势以震荡整理为主。

MACD数值为负，说明空头动能尚未完全消退，虽然跌幅有限，但反弹力度仍不足。目前RSI数据缺失，市场缺乏明显超买或超卖信号，意味着后续方向仍需成交量与价格突破进一步确认。

短线支撑位关注84.00附近，一旦跌破，可能下探83.20区域；上方阻力则位于85.20至85.50区间，该位置同时接近20日均线压制。若价格重新站稳均线，市场情绪有望逐步改善。

操作上，激进交易者可在84.00附近轻仓尝试低吸，但需严格设置止损。稳健策略建议等待价格有效突破85.50后再跟进多单，当前阶段更适合区间交易与短线快进快出。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana is trading near 84.39, holding in a narrow intraday range between 84.19 and 84.42, which suggests reduced volatility and temporary market indecision. Price action remains slightly below the 20-period moving average at 85.244, indicating that short-term momentum still favors sellers despite the modest 24-hour gain. The inability to reclaim the SMA decisively keeps the broader bias mildly bearish, although downside pressure appears limited unless volume increases sharply.

The MACD reading at -0.375 shows weakening bullish momentum and continued bearish crossover conditions. While the signal line is unavailable, the negative MACD value alone suggests that recovery attempts may struggle without stronger buying participation. RSI data is currently unavailable, but recent price compression near support implies that the market may be approaching a potential equilibrium zone. Traders should monitor whether SOL can stabilize above 84.20 to avoid a deeper corrective move.

Key support is developing around 84.20, with stronger downside protection likely near 83.50 if selling accelerates. On the upside, immediate resistance sits near the SMA region around 85.20 to 85.30, followed by a broader resistance zone near 86.00 where prior momentum weakened. A sustained move above the moving average could improve sentiment and trigger short-covering activity, while repeated rejection beneath resistance would reinforce the current consolidation structure.

Short-term traders may prefer range-based strategies until a clearer breakout develops. Buying near support with tight risk controls could offer favorable reward potential if price rebounds toward the 85.20 area. More conservative participants may wait for confirmation above resistance before entering long positions. If SOL falls below 84.00 with stronger momentum, bearish continuation trades toward lower support levels may become increasingly attractive.
